## Debug log

<!--
By far the fastest way to get a bug fixed is to attach the debug log:

1. Settings → Debug → flip to ON
2. Reproduce the bug
3. Settings → Debug Logs → click OPEN — Explorer pops up at %LOCALAPPDATA%\com.proxchat.app\
4. Drag lolproxchat.log into this issue (or lolproxchat.1.log if you've already restarted the app)

The log is plain text. It contains your summoner name + nearby players' names (gameplay-public) and technical IP info from WebRTC ICE candidates. Skim and redact if any of that is sensitive in your case.

Without a log, intermittent bugs (especially voice-related ones) are usually un-diagnosable. With one, most can be diagnosed in minutes.
-->
